Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-python, python3-all, python3-setuptools, python3-pip, python3-wheel
Build-Depends-Indep: fonts-noto-extra, gettext, ghostscript, gir1.2-gtk-3.0, gir1.2-goocanvas-2.0, gsfonts, help2man, imagemagick, librsvg2-common, libtiff-tools, ocrmypdf (>= 15.4.3), poppler-utils, python3-gi, python3-gi-cairo, python3-iso639, python3-sane, python3-tesserocr, sane-utils (>= 1.0.17), python3-polib, python3-pytest-cov, python3-pytest-timeout, python3-pytest-pylint, python3-pytest-mock, python3-pytest-xvfb, xauth, xfonts-base
Testsuite-Triggers: python3-pytest-black, python3-pytest-cov, python3-pytest-mock, python3-pytest-pylint, python3-pytest-timeout, python3-pytest-xvfb
